message:
feat(c_interop): Add PyValue <-> PyObject bridge for c_interop calls

- Changed c_interop codegen to use runtime.PyValue.from() instead of
  raw @ptrCast, properly bridging *cpython.PyObject to PyValue
- Added PyValue.toPtr() method to extract underlying pointer for
  c_interop method calls (arr.sum() etc.)
- PyValue.from() already handles *cpython.PyObject -> PyValue conversion
  by checking PyBool/PyLong/PyFloat/PyUnicode/PyList types

This enables seamless type conversion between C extension objects
and metal0's native PyValue system.
